targets.query:
from(bucket: "jamming_kpi")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "detection")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rssi" or r._field == "spectral_flatness" or r._field == "s1_confidence")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "jamming_kpi")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "detection" and r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> group(columns: ["final_verdict"])
  |> count()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "jamming_kpi")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "detection" and r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> group(columns: ["s1_label"])
  |> count()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "jamming_kpi")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "detection" and r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "jamming_kpi")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "labeled_kpis")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "gmm_prob_attack")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
